headline: 《龙族》领跑热搜，《痴迷》本周最火
headlineEn: House of the Dragon Leads Trending, Obsession Tops This Week
summary: 今日无新片上映，本周《痴迷》热度登顶。《权力的游戏前传：龙族》领衔今日热搜，多部新作即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today; Obsession tops the week. House of the Dragon leads today's trends, with several upcoming titles.

industryHighlights.en: The Odyssey upcoming release highly anticipated

industryHighlights.text: 本周《火遮眼》跻身热搜前列
industryHighlights.en: Blinded by Fire enters top weekly trends
Spider-Man: Brand New Day soon to be scheduled
Evil Dead: Purgatory continues to spark buzz
